boundary: This failed interface Gate did not train or qualify parent-conditioned assignment and cannot authorize p(N), lattice, coordinates, joint generation, tensor conditioning, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.

failure.message: periodic CVP certificate exceeded image shell 4 for 60 pairs

scientific_interpretation: All 918 false-rejected graphs have an exact closest image inside the initial 27-image cube. The isotropic sigma_min(L) lower bound is too loose for elongated valid cells; the P1 data are not removed and the frozen shell limit is not changed.
